title: Drown in the Deep
description: Drown in the deep, or rise from it. No-Hands-Held modpack that pushes you to improve.
body:
![or rise from it.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a46f1ee89502b286f9d8f3b8f5ce63a7c2565507.png)

#                       Drown in the Deep will not hold your hand.
_You wake up and find yourself in a new world._
_You can feel the cold air nip at your skin. You will never be the same._

##                                   Features
- ❄️ Body Temperature - prepare for the winter & keep yourself cozy
- 💧 Thirst - boil water to receive purified water that you can safely consume
- 🍖 Hunger - eat a balanced diet, nutrition is important
- 🌍 Seasons - biome temperature changes every season
- 🏡 Build - claim land and protect your goods from nature and others
- ⚔️ Fight - mobs get stronger every day. So must you.
###  Major Mods Featured
- [Born in Chaos](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/born-in-chaos)
- Ad Astra
- Alex's Caves
- Alex's Mobs
- Antique Atlas 4
- Ars Nouveau
- Athena
- Blue Skies
- Blueprint
- Create
- Danger Close
- End Remastered
- Enhanced Celestials
- Epic Fight
- Friends&Foes
- Treechop
- Macaw's Mods
- Just Enough Guns
- Cataclysm
- Relics
- When Dungeons Arise
- Tough as Nails
- Yung's Mods
